site news - RSS

25.Dec.25 - site is now built with 11ty!

converted my site into one that is made with the static site generator 11ty and also gave it a new refreshed look! this will make updating and creating pages MUCH easier. will keep giving it minor updates in the coming days.

24.Jun.24 - siinamota fanlisting

finished the siinamota fanlisting: i walk because i was born

last updated on: 27.Jun.26 / go to the top / contact me

made with ❤︎ for siinamota and all living things that live in the galaxy

disclaimer: all content on this site belongs to siinamota and their respective creators which has been credited accordingly! no copyright infringement intended. this is a non-profit fansite.
